A company's revenue is $840,000 in year 1. It grows 12% in year 2, drops 8% in year 3, then grows 15% in year 4. Costs are fixed at $790,000 per year. In which years is the company profitable, and what is the cumulative profit or loss after year 4?

A tank holds 500 liters. Pipe A fills it at 40 L/min, pipe B fills at 25 L/min, and a drain empties 15 L/min. A opens at t=0, B opens at t=3 minutes, and the drain is open the whole time. At what time (in minutes and seconds) is the tank full?

Five houses in a row are painted red, blue, green, white, and yellow. The red house is immediately left of the blue house. The green house is not at either end. The white house is somewhere left of the green house. The yellow house is at the first position. What is the order of the houses from left to right?

Four colleagues (Priya, Omar, Chen, Rosa) each speak at a conference on a different day, Monday to Thursday. Priya speaks before Chen but after Omar. Rosa does not speak on Monday or Thursday. Chen does not speak on Tuesday. On which day does each person speak?

Write a Python function schedule(meetings) that takes a list of (start, end) tuples and returns the maximum number of non-overlapping meetings one person can attend. Include handling for meetings that end exactly when another starts.

Write a Python function flatten(d, sep='.') that flattens an arbitrarily nested dictionary into a single-level dict with keys joined by sep, handling empty nested dicts by omitting them. Example: {'a': {'b': 1, 'c': {'d': 2}}} -> {'a.b': 1, 'a.c.d': 2}.

Summarize the following in exactly two sentences: The municipal transit authority announced a phased overhaul of the city's bus network beginning next spring. Phase one replaces the aging diesel fleet on the ten busiest routes with battery-electric buses, funded partly by a federal clean-transit grant. Phase two, scheduled for the following year, redraws several suburban routes to connect with the new light-rail terminus, which planners say could cut average commute times by up to eighteen minutes. Critics note that two low-income neighborhoods lose their direct downtown line under the redesign, and the authority has promised a shuttle service pilot in response. The full transition is expected to take three years and reduce the network's operating emissions by more than half.
